data.content: Implemented responsive terminal-tab overflow handling: non-wrapping tab chips, compact label mode under tight width (beat id only with project prefix), horizontal scroll arrows with edge fade indicators, and Alt+Shift+Left/Right keyboard scrolling. Added deterministic tab-strip layout helpers + unit tests. Quality gates run in worktree: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
